calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-10-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Wade appeared by zoom for Allen Van.

The court questioned whether the heirs understood the value of their assignments. Mr. Wade stated that they did. The First and Final Report and Petition for Approval of Adminstrator's Fees, etc. is under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
